subject: [PATCH v3 06/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in non-present PMD walkers

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch updates various Linux kernel functions to handle PMD (Page Map Directory) swap entries in non-present PMD walkers, mirroring the behavior of PTE-level equivalents. The changes include adding a new helper function for accounting swap and swap_pss, updating several functions to handle swap entries alongside migration entries, and modifying functions that handle faults, madvise operations, and memory policy enforcement. The goal is to ensure correct handling of swapped-out THPs (Transparent Huge Pages) in various kernel paths.
